Séguier|id=2533}} | updated = 27 October 2025 }} '''Paul Séguier''' (born 8 September 1997) is a [[French people|French]] professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|pr}} for the [[AS Carcassonne]] in the [[Super XIII]] and [[France national rugby league team|France]] at international level.{{cite web|url=http://www.skysports.com/rugby-league/catalans-vs-castleford/preview/45630|title=Catalans 28-34 Castleford: Solomona sets Super League try scoring record|publisher=Sky Sports|date=2016-09-17|accessdate=2016-09-14}} He has spent time on loan at [[Saint-Esteve XIII Catalan|Saint-Esteve]] in the [[Elite One Championship]], and [[Toulouse Olympique]] and the [[Barrow Raiders]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]]. ==Background== Seguier was born in [[Albi]], [[France]]. ==Playing career== ===Catalans Dragons=== Séguier is a [[France national rugby league team|French under 19]] international.{{cite web|url= http://www.ffr13.fr/player/paul-seguier/|title=Paul SEGUIER|publisher=FFR13|date=2016-09-19|accessdate=2016-09-19}} On 14 October 2023, he played in Catalans [[2023 Super League Grand Final]] loss against [[Wigan Warriors|Wigan]].{{cite news|url=https://www.theguardian.com/sport/2023/oct/14/catalans-dragons-wigan-super-league-grand-final-rugby-league-match-report/|title=Wigan Warriors crowned Super League champions after downing Dragons|newspaper=The Observer|date=14 October 2023 |last1=Bower |first1=Aaron }} ===AS Carcassonne=== On 4 August 2025 it was reported that he had signed for [[AS Carcassonne]] in the [[Super XIII]]{{cite web|website=Total RL|date=4 Aug 2025|accessdate=5 Aug 2025|author=Callum Walker|title=Catalans Dragons prop Paul Seguier finds new club|url=https://www.totalrl.com/catalans-dragons-prop-paul-seguier-finds-new-club/}} ===International=== He made his international debut on 25 October 2019 in the 62–4 defeat to the [[Junior Kangaroos]].{{citation needed|date=October 2022}} ==References== {{reflist|30em}} ==External links== *[http://www.catalansdragons.com/en/fiche-370-seguier-paul/ Catalans Dragons profile]
